principle: WLT is the sole owner of financial truth. DSH is the operational layer. This boundary is enforced by guard and is a DO_NOT_MERGE condition if violated.

wlt_runtime_state.wlt_000_scope: Reference-only endpoints: payment_status_refs, settlement_status_refs, refund_status_refs, wallet_refs
wlt_runtime_state.wlt_generated_client: NOT_GENERATED — required before any DSH surface consumes WLT reference data
wlt_runtime_state.wlt_mobile_surfaces: NOT_STARTED — all mobile WLT surfaces have gitkeep only
wlt_runtime_state.wlt_control_panel: SKELETON_PROOF_ONLY — WltFinanceReadOnlySkeletonProof.tsx present but not a production screen

dsh_reference_to_wlt.allowed_usage: DSH surfaces may import from services/wlt/frontend/dsh/shared/ to read WLT reference status. No mutation calls permitted.
dsh_reference_to_wlt.forbidden_usage: DSH surfaces must NOT call WLT mutation endpoints directly.

donor_boundary_assessment.detail: Donor migration 025 explicitly dropped refund_amount and settlement_amount columns from DSH stores. Donor dsh-wlt-boundary.ts declares mutation: forbidden.
donor_boundary_assessment.assessment: CLEAN — boundary is respected in donor. Adopt donor boundary logic as-is.

dsh_010_constraint.allowed: Display WLT-provided settlement and payment status summaries in control-panel finance section
dsh_010_constraint.forbidden: Any calculation, mutation, or aggregation of financial data within DSH

wlt_activation_sequence.step_3: Generate WLT TypeScript client after WLT-001 contract is defined
wlt_activation_sequence.step_4: DSH-005 Checkout Intent consumes WLT payment-sessions endpoint
wlt_activation_sequence.step_5: DSH-010 Finance Visibility consumes WLT settlement-summary endpoint
